AUTH_REQUIRED.title: Ana buƙatar shiga
AUTH_REQUIRED.message: Zaman ku ya ƙare. Da fatan za a shiga don ci gaba.

AUTH_EXPIRED.title: Zaman ya ƙare
AUTH_EXPIRED.message: Zaman ku ya ƙare saboda tsaro. Da fatan za a sake shiga.

AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED.title: Ana buƙatar tabbatarwa
AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED.message: Da fatan za a kammala tabbatar da ainihi don ci gaba.

AUTH_FORBIDDEN.title: An hana shiga
AUTH_FORBIDDEN.message: Ba ku da izini don yin wannan aikin.

ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.title: Ba a sami asusu ba
ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.message: Ba a sami asusun da kuke nema ba.

ACCOUNT_FROZEN.title: An daskare asusu
ACCOUNT_FROZEN.message: An daskare wannan asusu kuma ba zai iya aiwatar da mu'amala a yanzu ba.

ACCOUNT_CLOSED.title: An rufe asusu
ACCOUNT_CLOSED.message: An rufe wannan asusu kuma ba ya aiki.

INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.title: Kuɗi bai isa ba
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.message: Babu isassun kuɗi a cikin wannan asusun don kammala mu'amala.

TRANSFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.title: An wuce iyakar canja wuri
TRANSFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.message: Wannan canja wuri ya wuce iyakar ku ta yau ko ta kowane mu'amala.

TRANSFER_INVALID_AMOUNT.title: Adadin da ba daidai ba
TRANSFER_INVALID_AMOUNT.message: Da fatan za a shigar da adadin canja wuri mai inganci fiye da sifili.

TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT.title: An zaɓi asusu ɗaya
TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT.message: Asusun tushe da na makoma dole ne su bambanta.

TRANSFER_CUTOFF_PASSED.title: Lokacin yanke ya wuce
TRANSFER_CUTOFF_PASSED.message: Lokacin yanke na yau ya wuce. Za a aiwatar da canja wuri a ranar aiki ta gaba.

TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND.title: Ba a sami canja wuri ba
TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND.message: Ba a sami canja wurin da kuke nema ba.

BILL_NOT_FOUND.title: Ba a sami lissafi ba
BILL_NOT_FOUND.message: Ba a sami lissafin ko wanda ake biya da kuke nema ba.

BILL_ALREADY_PAID.title: An riga an biya
BILL_ALREADY_PAID.message: An riga an biya wannan lissafi.

BILL_PAST_DUE.title: Lissafi ya wuce lokaci
BILL_PAST_DUE.message: Wannan lissafi ya wuce ranar biyan sa. Ana iya ɗaukar kuɗin jinkirta.

CARD_NOT_FOUND.title: Ba a sami kati ba
CARD_NOT_FOUND.message: Ba a sami katin da kuke nema ba.

CARD_ALREADY_LOCKED.title: An riga an kulle kati
CARD_ALREADY_LOCKED.message: An riga an kulle wannan kati.

CARD_LIMIT_INVALID.title: Iyakar kati marar inganci
CARD_LIMIT_INVALID.message: Iyakar kashe kuɗi da kuka shigar ba ta da inganci. Da fatan za a duba mafi ƙaranci da mafi girma.

RDC_IMAGE_QUALITY.title: Matsalar ingancin hoto
RDC_IMAGE_QUALITY.message: Ba a iya karanta hoton cak a fili ba. Da fatan za a sake ɗaukar hoto a cikin haske mai kyau.

RDC_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.title: An wuce iyakar ajiya
RDC_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.message: Wannan cak ya wuce iyakar ajiyar wayar ku.

RDC_DUPLICATE_CHECK.title: An gano cak mai maimaituwa
RDC_DUPLICATE_CHECK.message: Alama ce cewa an riga an ajiye wannan cak.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Kuskuren tabbatarwa
VALIDATION_ERROR.message: Wasu filaye sun ƙunshi bayanan da ba daidai ba. Da fatan za a sake duba su.

INVALID_INPUT.title: Shigarwa marar inganci
INVALID_INPUT.message: Da fatan za a duba shigarwar ku kuma a sake gwadawa.

RATE_LIMITED.title: Buƙatun da yawa
RATE_LIMITED.message: Kun yi buƙatu da yawa. Da fatan za a jira kuma a sake gwadawa.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Wani abu bai dace ba
INTERNAL_ERROR.message: Kuskure mara tsammani ya faru. An sanar da ƙungiyar mu.

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Sabis ba ya samuwa
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.message: Wannan sabis ba ya samuwa na ɗan lokaci. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa bayan ƴan mintuna.

GATEWAY_ERROR.title: Kuskuren haɗi
GATEWAY_ERROR.message: Ba a iya haɗawa da sabis na banki ba. Da fatan za a duba haɗin ku kuma a sake gwadawa.

fallback.title: Wani abu bai dace ba
fallback.message: Kuskure mara tsammani ya faru. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
